content: Start the CBO intervention profile for Porto Alegre. Use the /cbo-intervention skill flow. Always use the ask_user tool for multiple-choice questions. In your first message, mention that the user can drop existing documents (proposals, reports, plans, photos) into the chat at any time — you'll extract info and auto-fill sections.

Olá! Welcome to the COUGAR Intervention Profile Assistant! 🌱

I'm here to help you document your nature-based solution (NBS) project in Porto Alegre. We'll work through this together in 6 phases, and I'll help you create a structured profile that can support funding applications, coordination with the municipality, and connection to the broader COUGAR portfolio.

**📄 Document Drop Tip:** You can drop existing documents into this chat at any time — proposals, project reports, budgets, photos, presentations, anything you have! I'll read them, extract relevant information, and auto-fill sections of your profile to save you time.

Let me start by learning about your organization!

I've started Phase 1: **Who We Are** 🏢

Please answer the two questions above about your organization type and how long you've been active. This will help me understand your organizational foundation and assess your delivery capacity.
Great! Let me document this and continue building your organization profile.

Perfect! I've recorded that you're a registered NGO with 3-10 years of experience in the community. This shows good organizational foundation!

Now let me learn more about your organization:
Community development and social inclusion; 16-30 people; Mix of paid staff and volunteers

Great! Thank you for sharing that. I can see you're running a well-established NGO with a solid team working on community development and social inclusion — that's a strong foundation for climate resilience work.

Let me update your profile and then continue gathering some more organizational details.

Perfect! I've updated your organizational profile and scored your **Organizational Delivery Capacity** at 2/3 — which reflects your demonstrated project management experience with a structured team.

Now let's continue building out the organizational profile. I'd like to learn more about your experience and your team's capabilities:
Yes, multiple projects; Yes, we have staff or volunteers with formal training
Excelente! Já temos um bom perfil inicial da sua organização. Vou atualizar o documento e avançar para a próxima fase.

Perfect! You've scored well on organizational capacity and technical experience. I've documented your prior project experience and technical training.

---

## 🗺️ Phase 2: Where We Work — Intervention Site

Now let's identify where your NBS project is located. Porto Alegre faces significant flood risks — as we saw with the catastrophic May 2024 floods that affected 48% of the city. Understanding your site's location, vulnerability, and community context is critical.

**I'll open an interactive map** so you can:
- ✅ Select the **zone/neighborhood** where you work
- ✅ Click on **specific parks, schools, wetlands** you're targeting (or draw custom areas)
- ✅ See **flood risk overlays** (Fluvial Risk Index and High Water Mark from 2024)

This will help us understand how your site relates to flood-prone areas and existing green infrastructure.

🗺️ **The map is now open!** 

Take your time to:
1. **Zoom to your neighborhood** in Porto Alegre
2. **Select the zone boundary** (if your neighborhood is highlighted)
3. **Click on specific features** — parks, schools, wetlands — where you're working
4. **Draw custom areas** if your site isn't already on the map

The **blue/purple overlay** shows flood risk zones. The **2024 high water mark** shows areas that were inundated during the historic May 2024 floods.

Once you've made your selections, I'll document your site details and we'll continue with community context questions! 🌱
